domains.name: Platform Fundamentals
domains.description: Core platform concepts, navigation, and basic administration

domains.name: User Interface
domains.description: Forms, lists, and user interface customization

domains.name: Automation & Workflow
domains.description: Business rules, workflows, and process automation

domains.name: Data Management
domains.description: Tables, fields, relationships, and data import/export

domains.name: Integration & APIs
domains.description: REST APIs, web services, and external integrations

questions.text: What is the primary purpose of the ServiceNow platform?

options.text: To provide cloud-based IT service management
To replace all existing IT tools

questions.context: ServiceNow is a cloud-based platform that provides IT service management and business process automation.

questions.text: Which component is responsible for controlling access to records in ServiceNow?
questions.context: ACLs are the primary mechanism for controlling record-level access in ServiceNow.

questions.text: What is the purpose of a Business Rule in ServiceNow?

options.text: To automate business logic and data processing
To control user access to records

questions.context: Business Rules execute server-side logic to automate business processes and data manipulation.

questions.text: Which table is used to store user information in ServiceNow?
questions.context: The sys_user table is the core table for storing user account information in ServiceNow.

questions.text: What is the difference between a List and a Form view in ServiceNow?

options.text: Lists show multiple records, Forms show single records
Lists are read-only, Forms allow editing
There is no difference between them

questions.context: Lists display multiple records in a tabular format, while Forms display a single record for detailed viewing and editing.

questions.text: Which REST API method is used to create a new record?
questions.context: POST is the HTTP method used to create new resources in REST APIs.

questions.text: What is the purpose of a UI Policy in ServiceNow?

options.text: To dynamically show/hide fields and sections

questions.context: UI Policies control the visibility and behavior of form elements based on field values.

questions.text: Which field type is used to store large amounts of text?
questions.context: The Text field type is designed for storing large amounts of text data.

questions.text: What is the purpose of a Workflow in ServiceNow?
questions.context: Workflows automate complex business processes by defining a sequence of activities and approvals.

questions.text: Which role is required to access the System Administration module?
questions.context: The admin role provides full administrative access to the ServiceNow platform.

questions.text: What is the purpose of a Reference field in ServiceNow?

options.text: To store date and time values

questions.context: Reference fields create relationships between records in different tables.

questions.text: Which component is used to create custom applications in ServiceNow?
questions.context: Studio is the development environment for creating custom applications in ServiceNow.

questions.text: What is the purpose of a Client Script in ServiceNow?

options.text: To add client-side interactivity and validation

questions.context: Client Scripts run in the browser to provide client-side functionality and validation.

questions.text: Which table stores incident records in ServiceNow?
questions.context: The incident table is the core table for managing IT incidents in ServiceNow.

questions.text: What is the purpose of a Scheduled Job in ServiceNow?

options.text: To execute automated tasks on a schedule

questions.context: Scheduled Jobs run automated tasks at specified intervals or times.

questions.text: Which field type is used to store email addresses?
questions.context: The Email field type provides validation for email address format.

questions.text: What is the purpose of a Transform Map in ServiceNow?

options.text: To map and transform data during import

questions.context: Transform Maps define how data is mapped and transformed when importing from external sources.

questions.text: Which REST API endpoint is used to retrieve a specific record?
questions.context: The specific record endpoint includes the sys_id to retrieve a single record.

questions.text: What is the purpose of a Service Catalog in ServiceNow?

options.text: To provide a self-service portal for users

questions.context: Service Catalog provides a self-service portal where users can request services and items.

questions.text: Which component is used to create custom reports in ServiceNow?
questions.context: Report Designer is the tool used to create custom reports and dashboards.

questions.text: What is the purpose of the ServiceNow instance?

options.text: To provide a unique environment for each customer
To store all customer data in one place

questions.text: Which module is used to manage IT assets?
What is the purpose of the ServiceNow mobile app?

options.text: To provide mobile access to ServiceNow
